meta.title: 生死观与超越
meta.description: Native-level philosophical discourse on life, death, and transcendence in Chinese: idioms, Buddhist/existentialist concepts, formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 원어민 수준의 생사관·초월 철학 담화: 성어, 불교·실존주의 개념, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「生死观」(shēngsǐguān) means "one's philosophy or outlook on life and death".
explanation.ko: 「生死观」(shēngsǐguān)는 삶과 죽음에 대한 철학적 관점을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「生死观」是什么意思？(What does 生死观 mean?)
choices: 生死观(one's outlook/philosophy on life and death)

explanation.en: 「视死如归」is an idiom meaning "to view death as calmly as returning home", describing fearlessness in the face of death.
explanation.ko: 「视死如归」는 '죽음을 집에 돌아가듯 평온하게 여기다'라는 뜻의 성어로, 죽음 앞에서 두려워하지 않음을 묘사한다.

questions.prompt: 「视死如归」是什么意思？(What does 视死如归 mean?)
choices: 将死亡看作如同回家一般平静自然，毫不畏惧(viewing death as calmly as returning home, without fear)

explanation.en: 「超越生死」means transcending attachment to and fear of life and death through spiritual cultivation or belief.
explanation.ko: 「超越生死」는 정신적 경지나 신념을 통해 생사에 대한 집착과 두려움에서 벗어남을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「超越生死」是什么意思？(What does 超越生死 mean?)
choices: 完全被死亡的恐惧所支配
通过某种精神境界或信念，摆脱对生死的执着与恐惧(transcending attachment to and fear of life and death through some spiritual state or belief)

explanation.en: 「向死而生」means confronting death's inevitability to live more meaningfully in the present.
explanation.ko: 「向死而生」는 죽음의 필연성을 직시함으로써 더 진실하고 의미 있게 현재를 산다는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「向死而生」在生死观讨论中是什么意思？(What does 向死而生 mean in discussions of life and death philosophy?)
choices: 正视死亡的必然性，从而更真切、更有意义地活在当下(confronting the inevitability of death in order to live more authentically and meaningfully in the present)

explanation.en: 「生死轮回」(shēngsǐ lúnhuí) refers to the cycle of birth, death, and rebirth, a concept central to Buddhist and Hindu philosophy.
explanation.ko: 「生死轮回」(shēngsǐ lúnhuí)는 불교·힌두 철학의 핵심 개념인 '생사윤회'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「生死轮回」是什么意思？(What does 生死轮回 mean?)
choices: 生死轮回(the cycle of birth, death, and rebirth — samsara)
否定生命延续的可能性

explanation.en: 「生死观」means "philosophy of life and death".
explanation.ko: 「生死观」는 '생사관'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 不同的文化与宗教传统孕育了迥然不同的___，深刻影响着人们对生命价值的理解。(Different cultural and religious traditions have given rise to vastly different philosophies of life and death, profoundly influencing people's understanding of life's value.)

explanation.en: 「视死如归」describes fearlessness toward death.
explanation.ko: 「视死如归」는 죽음을 두려워하지 않음을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 古代许多志士仁人在为理想献身时表现出___的气概，令后世无限敬仰。(Many noble-minded people in ancient times displayed a spirit of "viewing death as calmly as returning home" when sacrificing themselves for their ideals, earning boundless admiration from later generations.)

explanation.en: 「超越生死」means transcending life and death.
explanation.ko: 「超越生死」는 생사를 초월함을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 许多宗教修行体系致力于帮助信徒达到___的精神境界，从而获得内心的平静与自由。(Many religious practice systems are dedicated to helping believers achieve the spiritual state of transcending life and death, thereby gaining inner peace and freedom.)
choices: 完全被死亡的恐惧所支配

explanation.en: 「向死而生」describes confronting mortality to live meaningfully.
explanation.ko: 「向死而生」는 죽음을 직시하여 의미 있게 삶을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 海德格尔提出的___理念，鼓励人们直面死亡这一终极事实，从而更加珍视与投入当下的生命。(Heidegger's concept of "being-toward-death" encourages people to directly confront the ultimate fact of death, thereby cherishing and engaging with present life more fully.)

explanation.en: 「生死轮回」means "the cycle of birth, death, and rebirth".
explanation.ko: 「生死轮回」는 '생사윤회'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 佛教哲学中的___观念认为，生命并非一次性的存在，而是在因果法则支配下不断循环流转。(The Buddhist philosophical concept of the cycle of birth and death holds that life is not a one-time existence, but continually cycles under the law of cause and effect.)
choices: 否定生命延续的可能性

explanation.en: 「激发」means "to unleash/stimulate".
explanation.ko: 「激发」는 '불러일으키다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 对死亡意义的深刻思考___了许多人对生命本身前所未有的珍视与感悟。(Profound reflection on the meaning of death has unleashed unprecedented appreciation and understanding of life itself in many people.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其终日沉溺于对死亡的恐惧与逃避，___不如坦然接受生命有限这一事实，从而更加充实地度过每一天。(Rather than spending all day indulging in fear and avoidance of death, it's better to calmly accept the fact of life's finitude, thereby living each day more fully.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这位智者___已然步入暮年、深知死亡将至，___依然从容淡定，未曾流露出丝毫恐惧与不安。(Even though this sage had already entered his twilight years and knew well that death was approaching, he still remained composed and calm, never showing the slightest fear or unease.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 对死亡的超越之所以历来被视为精神修行的最高境界，___是因为它意味着彻底摆脱了对生命有限性的执着与恐惧。(The transcendence of death has traditionally been regarded as the highest state of spiritual cultivation precisely because it means completely freeing oneself from attachment to and fear of life's finitude.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦真正超越了对死亡的恐惧，___往往能够以更加从容豁达的心态面对人生的种种际遇。(Once a person truly transcends the fear of death, they can often face life's various circumstances with a more composed and open-minded attitude.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，对生死问题的深刻思考___在于帮助人类更好地理解生命的意义与价值。(In the final analysis, profound reflection on questions of life and death still lies in helping humanity better understand the meaning and value of life.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，宗教信仰与哲学思辨___为人类应对死亡这一终极课题提供了不同却各具价值的路径。(From this we can see that both religious faith and philosophical speculation jointly provide different yet equally valuable paths for humanity to cope with the ultimate topic of death.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，面对死亡这一终极课题，不同文明___发展出了各具特色的哲学与宗教体系来加以应对。(As everyone knows, facing the ultimate topic of death, different civilizations have often developed distinctive philosophical and religious systems to respond to it.)

explanation.en: 「岂仅是〜」is a classical-style rhetorical construction.
explanation.ko: 「岂仅是〜」는 고전적 반어 구문이다.

questions.prompt: 对死亡的超越，岂___消极的逃避或否认，实则是一种积极拥抱生命有限性、进而获得内心自由的深刻智慧。(Transcendence of death is by no means merely passive avoidance or denial, but truly a profound wisdom of actively embracing life's finitude, thereby attaining inner freedom.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 面对亲人的离世，人们___通过悼念仪式来寄托哀思，寻求心灵的慰藉。(Facing the passing of loved ones, people often use mourning rituals to express their grief and seek spiritual comfort.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 坦然接受〜: 不如坦然接受 (not 坦然不如接受).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '坦然接受〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如坦然接受'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其终日沉溺于对死亡的恐惧与逃避，坦然不如接受生命有限这一事实，从而更加充实地度过每一天。(Rather than spending all day indulging in fear and avoidance of death, it's better to calmly accept the fact of life's finitude, thereby living each day more fully.) — find the error
choices: 与其终日沉溺于对死亡的恐惧与逃避，不如坦然接受生命有限这一事实，从而更加充实地度过每一天。
与其终日沉溺于对死亡的恐惧与逃避，坦然不如接受生命有限这一事实，从而更加充实地度过每一天。
与其终日沉溺于对死亡的恐惧与逃避，不如接受坦然生命有限这一事实，从而更加充实地度过每一天。
与其终日沉溺于对死亡的恐惧与逃避，坦然接受不如生命有限这一事实，从而更加充实地度过每一天。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 对死亡的超越之所以历来被视为精神修行的最高境界，因为是它意味着彻底摆脱了对生命有限性的执着与恐惧。(The transcendence of death has traditionally been regarded as the highest state of spiritual cultivation precisely because it means completely freeing oneself from attachment to and fear of life's finitude.) — find the error
choices: 对死亡的超越之所以历来被视为精神修行的最高境界，是因为它意味着彻底摆脱了对生命有限性的执着与恐惧。
对死亡的超越之所以历来被视为精神修行的最高境界，因为是它意味着彻底摆脱了对生命有限性的执着与恐惧。
对死亡的超越之所以历来被视为精神修行的最高境界，是它因为意味着彻底摆脱了对生命有限性的执着与恐惧。
对死亡的超越之所以历来被视为精神修行的最高境界，它是因为意味着彻底摆脱了对生命有限性的执着与恐惧。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦真正超越了对死亡的恐惧，往往才能够以更加从容豁达的心态面对人生的种种际遇。(Once a person truly transcends the fear of death, they can often face life's various circumstances with a more composed and open-minded attitude.) — find the error
choices: 一个人一旦真正超越了对死亡的恐惧，往往就能够以更加从容豁达的心态面对人生的种种际遇。
一个人一旦真正超越了对死亡的恐惧，往往才能够以更加从容豁达的心态面对人生的种种际遇。
一个人一旦真正超越了对死亡的恐惧，才往往能够以更加从容豁达的心态面对人生的种种际遇。
一个人一旦真正超越了对死亡的恐惧，往往能够才以更加从容豁达的心态面对人生的种种际遇。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其终日沉溺于对死亡的恐惧与逃避，不如坦然接受生命有限这一事实 ("Rather than spending all day indulging in fear and avoidance of death, it's better to calmly accept the fact of life's finitude").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其终日沉溺于对死亡的恐惧与逃避，不如坦然接受生命有限这一事实' (하루 종일 죽음의 두려움과 회피에 빠져 있느니 차라리 삶이 유한하다는 사실을 담담히 받아들이는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其终日沉溺于对死亡的恐惧与逃避，__________生命有限这一事实。(Rather than spending all day indulging in fear and avoidance of death, it's better to calmly accept the fact of life's finitude.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一个人一旦真正超越了对死亡的恐惧，往往就能够以更加从容豁达的心态面对人生的种种际遇 ("Once a person truly transcends the fear of death, they can often face life's various circumstances with a more composed and open-minded attitude").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一个人一旦真正超越了对死亡的恐惧，往往就能够以更加从容豁达的心态面对人生的种种际遇' (사람은 일단 죽음의 두려움을 진정으로 초월하면 흔히 더 여유롭고 대범한 마음가짐으로 인생의 여러 상황을 마주할 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦真正超越了对死亡的恐惧，__________以更加从容豁达的心态面对人生的种种际遇。(Once a person truly transcends the fear of death, they can often face life's various circumstances with a more composed and open-minded attitude.)
